element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early game (new feature from first game)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Mobility enhancement for traversal and evasion
Enables vertical space access in subsequent levels
Defensive capability for final level challenges

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After defeating any four selectable areas
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Mandatory progression gate before final level

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating mid-level boss and acquiring new power suit
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Stage-gated progression with player-controlled sequencing for first four levels, then mandatory final two stages; tension builds through ability gating and forced Area 5 progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Player choice of stage order among first four areas; collectible power suits gated behind mid-bosses

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible with basic boomerang and slide mechanics; player controls challenge pacing by stage selection order
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalates through mid-level bosses; each defeated boss removes traversal restrictions by unlocking specialized suits
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mandatory Area 5 and final stage increase difficulty; player equipped with up to four power suits depending on route
notable_spikes: Transition to mandatory Area 5 (removes stage selection freedom)
Final boss encounter after Area 5 completion
Cyborg boss threat implied as primary mission objective

notable_level_patterns.description: Player can choose any of four initial stages in any order; non-linear progression with self-determined difficulty curve
Each stage contains a mid-level boss that, when defeated, unlocks a collectible power suit enabling new traversal types
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All four initial areas contain mid-bosses awarding Newt, Wet, Rocket, or Patriot suits

notable_level_patterns.description: After clearing four selectable stages, Area 5 becomes mandatory, funneling player toward final stage
Four distinct suits serve different level types: vertical (Newt), aquatic (Wet), aerial (Rocket), defensive (Patriot)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Applied across stage design matching suit functionality

sources_used: Wikipedia - Power Blade 2 (gameplay, plot, power suits description)
The Cutting Room Floor - Power Blade 2 (developer credits, regional differences)
